items.claim: Max Holloway's loss to Charles Oliveira demonstrated that a bigger, stronger wrestler can dominate him.
items.quote: it showed that a bigger man can dominate Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's social media footage of him shooting double-leg takedowns may be a red herring.
items.quote: the fact that he put that on social media, that shows that it could possibly be a red herring.

items.claim: Fighters who suffer a leg break like Conor McGregor's do not typically return to their previous form.
items.quote: we know about that kind of surgery and our fighters don't really come back from that.

items.claim: The fight taking place at 170 lbs favors Conor McGregor.
items.quote: The fight is happening at welterweight, at 170 lbs. That immediately favors Conor McGregor.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a longer reach than Max Holloway despite being shorter.
items.quote: Conor's got a 74-in reach. Max Holloway, 69-in reach.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will likely weigh approximately 185 lbs on fight night.
items.quote: On the night, I'm going to guess he's going to be about 185 lbs.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience some nervousness and anxiety regarding his return to the octagon.
items.quote: he's also going to have, in my opinion, some nervousness, a little bit of anxiety.
